---
title: "/AI Manifesto History"
date: January 5, 2026
date-modified: last-modified
reference-location: margin
---


My thoughts on AI are constantly evolving. This page tracks changes in my /AI Manifestos.

## [Spring 2026 semester](Spring2026.qmd)

I added a link to Keith ([2026](https://ishelp.info/data/Learning_wAI_mjk.pdf)) from a meeting I recently attended. I have switched to allowing AI, not for answering questions or generating text, but for "higher-tier" roles that Keith outlines. 

## [Winter 2026 semester](Winter2026.qmd)

This was my first /AI Manifesto. I have quotes from what BYU has said about it, including statements by the department, college, and university. I have thoughts about responsible use of AI, including a recent survey by BYU Linguistics MA students about what they consider responsible use. I end by telling students that I expect zero AI whatsoever.
